ReportTitle.title: 云平台告警量和超时告警统计报表

root.sql: select * from (select a.*,rowNum m_rowNum from (select to_char(tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.first_result, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') first_result, tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.nms_name g1, meta_objects.ZH_NAME g2, tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.eqp_object_class eqp_object_class, nvl(tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.level1_alarm_num,0)+nvl(tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.level2_alarm_num,0)+nvl(tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.level3_alarm_num,0)+nvl(tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.level4_alarm_num,0) g3, nvl(tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.level1_alarm_num,0) g4, nvl(tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.level2_alarm_num,0) g5, nvl(tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.level3_alarm_num,0) g6, nvl(tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.level4_alarm_num,0) g7, nvl( tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.long_alarm_num_4h,0) g8 , nvl(tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.long_alarm_num_8h,0) g9, nvl(tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.long_alarm_num_12h,0) g10, nvl(tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.long_alarm_num_24h,0) g11 from tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum left join (select ZH_NAME,OBJECT_CLASS from meta_objects where object_class in(508,1521,502,905,901,1514,506,1520)) meta_objects on tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.eqp_object_class=meta_objects.object_class where tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.first_result >=to_date('#time1#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.first_result <=to_date('#time2#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.omc_id in (#omcid#) and tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.eqp_object_class in(#eqp_type#) and tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.sum_level=#sum_level# )a ) Where m_rowNum > #BegeinIndex# and m_rowNum <= #EndIndex#
root.countsql: select count(*) from (select tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.first_result first_result, tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.nms_name g1, meta_objects.ZH_NAME g2, tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.eqp_object_class eqp_object_class, nvl(tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.level1_alarm_num,0)+nvl(tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.level2_alarm_num,0)+nvl(tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.level3_alarm_num,0)+nvl(tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.level4_alarm_num,0) g3, nvl(tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.level1_alarm_num,0) g4, nvl(tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.level2_alarm_num,0) g5, nvl(tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.level3_alarm_num,0) g6, nvl(tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.level4_alarm_num,0) g7, nvl( tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.long_alarm_num_4h,0) g8 , nvl(tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.long_alarm_num_8h,0) g9, nvl(tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.long_alarm_num_12h,0) g10, nvl(tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.long_alarm_num_24h,0) g11 from tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum left join (select ZH_NAME,OBJECT_CLASS from meta_objects where object_class in(508,1521,502,905,901,1514,506,1520)) meta_objects on tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.eqp_object_class=meta_objects.object_class where tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.first_result >=to_date('#time1#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.first_result <=to_date('#time2#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.omc_id in (#omcid#) and tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.eqp_object_class in(#eqp_type#) and tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum.sum_level=#sum_level# )

Conditions.Condition: select distinct nms_name as text,omc_id as value from tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_sum

select '虚拟机' as text,508 as value from dual union all select '宿主机' as text,1521 as value from dual union all select '物理机' as text,502 as value from dual union all select '交换机' as text,905 as value from dual union all select '防火墙' as text,901 as value from dual union all select '虚拟存储' as text,1514 as value from dual union all select '应用' as text,506 as value from dual union all select '服务' as text,1520 as value from dual

ColumnItem.DetailWhereCondition: and org_severity in(1,2,3,4) and detail_data_flag is null
and org_severity=1 and detail_data_flag is null
and org_severity=2 and detail_data_flag is null
and org_severity=3 and detail_data_flag is null
and org_severity=4 and detail_data_flag is null

root.detailSql: select * from (select a.*,rowNum m_rowNum from (select to_char(tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_detail.first_result, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') a_cloumn_00, tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_detail.nms_name a_cloumn_01, meta_objects.ZH_NAME a_cloumn_02, tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_detail.eqp_label a_cloumn_03, tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_detail.org_severity a_cloumn_04, tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_detail.alarm_title_text a_cloumn_05, to_char(tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_detail.event_time, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') a_cloumn_06, to_char(tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_detail.cancel_time, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') a_cloumn_07 from tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_detail tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_detail,(select ZH_NAME,OBJECT_CLASS from meta_objects where object_class in(508,1521,502,905,901,1514,506,1520)) meta_objects where tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_detail.first_result =to_date('@first_result@','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_detail.eqp_object_class =@eqp_object_class@ and tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_detail.nms_name = '@g1@' and tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_detail.eqp_object_class =meta_objects.object_class {0} )a ) Where m_rowNum > #BegeinIndex# and m_rowNum <= #EndIndex#
root.detailCountSql: select count(*) from (select tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_detail.first_result a_cloumn_00, tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_detail.nms_name a_cloumn_01, meta_objects.ZH_NAME a_cloumn_02, tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_detail.eqp_label a_cloumn_03, tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_detail.org_severity a_cloumn_04, tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_detail.alarm_title_text a_cloumn_05, tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_detail.event_time a_cloumn_06, tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_detail.cancel_time a_cloumn_07 from tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_detail tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_detail,(select ZH_NAME,OBJECT_CLASS from meta_objects where object_class in(508,1521,502,905,901,1514,506,1520)) meta_objects where tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_detail.first_result =to_date('@first_result@','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_detail.eqp_object_class =@eqp_object_class@ and tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_detail.nms_name = '@g1@' and tfa_alarm_cpm_ql_detail.eqp_object_class =meta_objects.object_class {0} )
